name: flowchart-basic
source:
flowchart TD
A[Start] --> B[End]

name: flowchart-subgraph-explicit-id
source:
flowchart TD
subgraph api[API Layer]
  A[Gateway] --> B[Service]
end

name: flowchart-invalid-edge
source:
flowchart TD
A -->

name: flowchart-invalid-subgraph-close
source:
flowchart TD
subgraph api[API]
  A --> B

name: state-basic
source:
stateDiagram-v2
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> [*]

name: state-invalid-direction
source:
stateDiagram-v2
direction RLX
[*] --> Idle

name: sequence-basic
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant Alice
participant Bob
Alice->>Bob: Hello

name: sequence-activation-and-alt
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
A->>B: Request
activate B
alt success
  B-->>A: Response
else failure
  B-->>A: Error
end
deactivate B

name: sequence-invalid-message
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
A->>

name: sequence-partial-after-valid-message
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
A->>B: Hello
A->>

name: class-basic
source:
classDiagram
class Animal
class Duck
Animal <|-- Duck

name: class-cardinality-generic
source:
classDiagram
class Repository~T~
class User
Repository~T~ "1" --> "*" User : stores

name: class-invalid-relation
source:
classDiagram
class User
User -> Account

name: er-basic
source:
erDiagram
CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places

name: er-field-metadata
er-field-references-table-only
mindmap-basic
source:
mindmap
  Root
    Branch A
    Branch B

name: mindmap-wrapped-nodes
source:
mindmap
  root((Root))
    feature[[Child A]]
    decision{{Child B}}

name: journey-basic
source:
journey
title Checkout
section Happy
  Search: 5: User
  Buy: 3: User

name: journey-multiple-sections
source:
journey
title Incident Response
section Detect
  Alert fires: 5: SRE
section Resolve
  Mitigate: 3: SRE, Platform

name: journey-invalid-score
source:
journey
title Checkout
section Happy
  Search: User

name: state-notes-and-control
source:
stateDiagram-v2
state FanOut <<fork>>
state FanIn <<join>>
[*] --> FanOut
FanOut --> Idle
Idle --> FanIn
note right of Idle: Waiting
FanIn --> [*]

name: architecture-official-basic
source:
architecture-beta
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db

name: architecture-title-basic
source:
architecture-beta
title "Platform"
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db

name: architecture-extension-labeled-edge
source:
architecture-beta
service api(server)[API]
service db(database)[Database]
api:R --> L:db : SQL

name: flowchart-inline-class
source:
flowchart TD
A[API]:::hot --> B[(DB)]
classDef hot fill:#f66,stroke:#333

name: flowchart-class-assignment-line
source:
flowchart TD
A[API]
B[(DB)]
classDef hot fill:#f66,stroke:#333
class A,B hot

name: flowchart-modern-annotation-dotted-ids
source:
flowchart TD
api.gateway@{ shape: rect, label: "API Gateway" } --> db.primary@{ shape: cyl, label: "Primary DB" }

name: flowchart-unexpected-end
source:
flowchart TD
A --> B
end

name: state-composite-alias
source:
stateDiagram-v2
state "Working Set" as WorkingSet {
  [*] --> Busy
  Busy --> Idle
}
note left of WorkingSet: Parent note
Idle --> [*]

name: state-direction-lr
source:
stateDiagram-v2
direction LR
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> Running
Running --> [*]

name: sequence-par-and
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
participant C
par fast lane
  A->>B: Request
and slow lane
  A->>C: Request
end

name: sequence-note-inside-alt
source:
sequenceDiagram
participant A
participant B
alt success
  note over A, B: Shared context
  A->>B: Request
else failure
  B-->>A: Error
end

name: architecture-rich-node-kinds
source:
architecture-beta
person user[User]
container app(server)[App]
database_container data(database)[Data Store]
user:R --> L:app : HTTPS
app:R --> L:data : TCP:5432

name: unsupported-gitgraph
source:
gitGraph
commit id: "A"
